summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the user analysis and segmentation platform PWA. All 15 required features tested successfully including assessment flow, admin panel, and mock integrations.
passed_tests: Assessment flow - Start Assessment button works
User info form validation (name, email, phone required)
Question navigation - progress through all 10 questions
Option selection on questions with visual feedback
Assessment submission creates user in database
Score calculation and level assignment (Level 1: 10-14, Level 2: 15-18, Level 3: 19-22, Level 4: 23-26, Level 5: 27-30)
Result page displays correct level and score
Calendly embed shows only for levels 3-5 (tested Level 1 and Level 5)
VSL video embed working correctly
Admin registration and login with JWT
Admin dashboard displays users list
Admin can filter users by level
Admin can search users by name/email
CSV export functionality
View user detail with all responses
Mock integrations trigger (toast notifications for ActiveCampaign and WhatsApp)
All backend API endpoints (13/13 tests passed)
Score calculation logic validation
Admin authentication and authorization
User data persistence and retrieval
